name: Brochette Dijon Flambe
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the garlic, thyme, lemon juice, and drambuie. Cook over medium heat for about 10 minutes until reduced slightly.
2. Stir in the dijon mustard and honey, then simmer for a few minutes.
3. Season the chicken cubes with salt and pepper, then toss them with the mustard mixture.
4. Thread the meat onto skewers and grill or broil for 8 to 10 minutes on each side.
5. Heat 4 tablespoons drambuie until warm. Light the drambuie and pour over the meat.
6. This recipe can also be made with an equal amount of lamb instead of chicken. Enjoy this chicken recipe in good health!
